label: 🎯 Importuj ataki
url: javascript:(function(){var t=document.querySelector('#simple_message'); if(t){ try{var payload=btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(t.value||t.innerText||''))); var w=window.open('https://twdatabase.online/Attacks','_blank'); try{w.name='twd_attacks:'+payload;}catch(e){} }catch(e){alert('Błąd kodowania');}}else{ var table=document.querySelector('#incomings_table'); if(table){ try{var payload=btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(table.outerHTML))); var w=window.open('https://twdatabase.online/Attacks','_blank'); try{w.name='twd_attacks:'+payload;}catch(e){} }catch(e){alert('Błąd kodowania');}}else alert('Nie znaleziono pola z atakami.'); }})();
style: background: none !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; padding: 0 !important; margin-left: 5px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;
